prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `d282b262`.
codex_response:
**Result**

`d282b262` is implemented as “slide each connected non-background multicolor object as far right as possible, preserving its full shape/colors/rows and stopping at the border or an already-packed object.” I kept the Opus hint and discarded the Sonnet hint because Sonnet’s per-row compression rule contradicts the preserved 3x3/5x5 connected motifs in the official examples.

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d282b262/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d282b262/verifier.py#L4), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d282b262/generator.py#L36), [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d282b262/helpers.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d282b262/notes.md#L1). The generator stays close to the family by sampling disconnected two-color checkerboard squares on a fixed 15x15 grid, mostly 2x2/3x3 with rare 5x5 cases, then constructing the output by packing whole objects rightward. No new shared primitive was added.

**Validation**

- Official verifier: `pass d282b262: 4/4 official examples passed`
- Generated verifier: `pass d282b262: 1000/1000 generated examples passed`
- Visual sanity check: inspected [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d282b262/previews/preview_01.png); it looks on-family against [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d282b262/previews/originals.png)

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d282b262/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d282b262/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d282b262/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d282b262/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d282b262/previews/preview_03.png).
